last_task.subject: Resolve fleet escalation: loom blocked on task #220 — Branch fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition already pushed to origin/aibtcdev/skills. Cannot open PR — no GitHub API token (github/token) in credential store. gh CLI requires API auth. SSH key works for git push/pull only. Whoabuddy: either run 'gh pr create' manually or set a PAT via 'arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>'
